verses.text: Abraham' hun lai-a kialpi banah, tu-in tua gam sungah kialpi dang khat tung hi. Filistia mite' kumpipa Abimelek' omna Gerar-ah Isaac pai hi
Ama tungah Topa kilang a, “Egypt-ah paisuk kei in la, kong gen ding leitangah teng in

Hih leitangah tawlkhat om in. Nang tawh kong omkhawm ding a, thupha kong pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang leh na suanlekhakte tungah hih leitangte kong pia ding a, na pa Abraham' tungah ka thuciam ka tungsak ding hi

Na suanlekhakte vana aksi bangin tampi ka phasak ding a, na suanlekhakte tungah hih leitang khempeuh ka pia ding hi. Na suanlekhakte thupha ka piak bangin leitung minam khempeuh in thupha a ngahna dingun hong ngen ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Abraham in ka thu mangin, ka sawlna, ka thupiakna, ka ngeina kip leh ka thu zui hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Isaac, Gerar-ah teng hi

Tua mun mite in ama zi tawh kisai thu a dot uh ciangin amah in, “Ka sanggamnu hi,” na ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Rebekah' hangin tua gam mite in hong that khading ahih ciangin,” ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin, “Ka zi hi,” a cih ding lau hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah ngaihbaang hi
Tua lai-ah amah sauveipi a om khit ciangin, Filistia mite' kumpipa Abimelek a tawlet panin khuadak a, Isaac in a zi Rebekah a noh laitak mu kha hi

Tua ahih manin Abimelek in Isaac samin, “En in, amah na zi ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in nang in, ‘Amah ka sanggamnu hi,’ ci thei na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Isaac in ama kiangah, “ ‘Ama hangin si khading ka hih ciangin,’ ci-in ngaihsun ka hihna hang hi,” a ci hi
Abimelek in, “Ko tungah bangcia hih bangin hong gamta na hi hiam? Mite khat peuhpeuh na zi tawh lumkhawm pak kha thei ding a, kote' tungah mawhna hong tun' na hi ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Abimelek in mi khempeuh thu zasak a, “Hih mipa ahi zongin a zi ahi zongin a sukha peuhmah kithat ding hi,” a ci hi
Isaac in tua leitangah khai tuh a, tua kum mahin a zah za khat la hi. Topa in amah thupha pia a
a neihsa kibehlaplap ahih manin a hau mahmah khat a suak hi
Amah in tuuhon leh bawnghon, leh innkuan mi tampi nei a, Filistia mite in amah eng uh hi
(Ama pa Abraham' hun lai-a a pa' nasemte in a tawh tuikhuk khempeuh tu-in Filistia mite in hucipin lei vuk uh hi
Abimelek in Isaac kiangah, “Kote' kiang panin paikhia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote sangin nang na vanglian zaw hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua mun panin Isaac paikhia a, Gerar kuam sungah phual satin tua munah a teng hi
Isaac in a pa Abraham' hun lai-a a kitosa tuikhukte to pha kik hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Abraham' sih khit ciangin Filistia mite in tuate vukcip uh hi. Amah in a pa' phuahsa minte mah phuak kik hi
Ahih hangin Isaac' nasemte in tua kuam sung to-in tuikhuk a muh uh ciangin
Gerar gancingte leh Isaac' gancingte kitawng uh a, “Tui, ko-a' hi,” ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua tuikhuk Esek ci-in min a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute leh amah kitawng uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in tuikhuk dang khat to uh a, tua tungtangah zong amaute kitawng leuleu uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua pen Sitnah ci-in min a phuak hi

Tua mun panin amah kinin tuikhuk dang khat to leuleu hi. Tua tungtangah amaute kitawng nawnlo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Rehoboth ci-in min a phuak hi. “Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in Topa in eite-a' dingin omna hong bawlsak khin a, eite hih gamah i pung ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua lai mun panin amah Beersheba-ah paito hi

Tua zan mahin ama tungah Topa kilang a, “Kei pen na pa Abraham' Pasian ka hi hi. Lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka nasempa Abraham' huhau-in nang tawh kong om a, nang leh na suanlekhakte thupha hong pia-in kong pungsak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua lai munah biakna tau khat lamin Topa bia a, tua munah puanbuk a lam hi. Tua lai-ah Isaac' nasemte in tuikhuk khat a to uh hi.
Tua ciangin Gerar panin Abimelek a thu lamlakpa Ahuzzath leh a galkap mangpa Fikol tawh Isaac kiangah hong pai hi
Isaac in amaute' kiangah, “Note in kei hong mudahin note' kiang panin hong hawlkhia na hih uh ciangin bang hangin kei' kiangah hong hawh na hi uh hiam?” na ci hi

Amaute in, “Nang tawh Topa a omna teltakin ka mu uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin, kote in nang hong sukha loin, nang' tungah bangmah hong hih loin, a hoihin gamta-in lungnuam takin kong sawl khiat mah bangun kote' tungah nang in siatna nong bawl lohna dingin nang leh kote' kikalah kiciamna khat om hen la, nang tawh thuciamna khat bawl ni, a ci hi ung. Nang pen tu-in Topa' thupha piak na hi hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute-a' dingin pawi khat bawl a, amaute in pawi an ne-in a dawn uh hi
Zingsangin amaute tho baih uh a, khatlekhat kiciamna a bawl uh hi. Isaac in amaute a lampi ding uhah kha a, ama kiang panin amaute lungnuam takin a paikhia uh hi
Tua ni mahin Isaac' nasemte hong pai-in amau' tawhsa tuikhuk thu ama kiangah hong gen uh a, “Tui ka muzo uh hi,” hong ci uh hi
Amah in tua pen Shibah ci-in min phuak hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua khuapi min pen tuni dongin Beersheba kici hi
Esau kum sawmli a phak ciangin, Hit mi Beeri' tanu Judith leh Hit mi Elon' tanu Basemath zi-in la hi
A zite gel in Isaac leh Rebekah' nuntakna haksa sak uh hi.
